summary: Tested FinRomania 2.0 — Portofoliu BVB PRO Faza 3: AI Advisor. All 25 backend tests passed (100%). All 10 frontend scenarios verified via Playwright. GET /api/portfolio-bvb/ai-analysis works correctly: returns portfolio_summary (overall_signal=HOLD, risk_level=MEDIU, global_recommendation non-empty), positions array (BRD+H2O both PĂSTREAZĂ with RIDICAT confidence), from_cache=True on second call, generated_at ISO string. Frontend: ai-advisor-section renders correctly with MENȚINE badge (blue), RISC MEDIU badge (amber), per-position cards with PĂSTREAZĂ in blue, confidence dots ●●●, 'Din cache · 21:58 UTC' indicator.

issues: MINOR: 'Se analizează...' loading state exists in code but is nearly invisible when data is from cache (returns in ~100ms). This is expected behavior for cached responses. First fresh call (~5-10s) will properly show loading state.

passed_tests: ✅ GET /api/portfolio-bvb/ai-analysis without token → 401
✅ GET /api/portfolio-bvb/ai-analysis with invalid token → 401
✅ Demo login GET /api/auth/demo-login?secret=finromania-demo-2026 → PRO session_token
✅ GET /api/portfolio-bvb/ai-analysis with PRO token → 200
✅ Response has: portfolio_summary, positions, from_cache, generated_at, positions_analyzed=2
✅ portfolio_summary.overall_signal = HOLD (valid: HOLD|BUY_MORE|REDUCE)
✅ portfolio_summary.risk_level = MEDIU (valid: SCĂZUT|MEDIU|RIDICAT)
✅ portfolio_summary.global_recommendation = non-empty string (2-3 fraze)
✅ portfolio_summary.diversification_note present
✅ positions is list with 2 entries (BRD + H2O)
✅ All positions have required fields: symbol, signal, confidence, reason, key_metric
✅ BRD signal = PĂSTREAZĂ (valid signal)
✅ H2O signal = PĂSTREAZĂ (valid signal)
✅ All confidence values = RIDICAT (valid: RIDICAT|MEDIU|SCĂZUT)
✅ All position reasons are non-empty strings
✅ Second API call → from_cache=True (MongoDB cache working)
✅ generated_at is valid ISO datetime string
✅ Frontend: ai-advisor-section [data-testid=ai-advisor-section] present and visible
✅ Frontend: ai-generate-btn [data-testid=ai-generate-btn] visible with text 'Generează Analiză AI'
✅ Frontend: After click, AI results load (from cache: instantaneous)
✅ Frontend: ai-portfolio-summary [data-testid=ai-portfolio-summary] shows SUMAR GLOBAL
✅ Frontend: overall_signal HOLD → 'MENȚINE' badge in blue (bg-blue-100 text-blue-700)
✅ Frontend: risk_level MEDIU → 'RISC MEDIU' badge in amber (bg-amber-100 text-amber-700) with AlertTriangle icon
✅ Frontend: ai-positions-list [data-testid=ai-positions-list] present with 2 cards
✅ Frontend: ai-pos-BRD [data-testid=ai-pos-BRD] card with PĂSTREAZĂ badge in blue
✅ Frontend: ai-pos-H2O [data-testid=ai-pos-H2O] card with PĂSTREAZĂ badge in blue
✅ Frontend: Confidence dots ●●● shown for RIDICAT confidence (both positions)
✅ Frontend: 'Din cache · 21:58 UTC' indicator shown in AI Advisor header
✅ Frontend: Disclaimer text '⚠️ Recomandările AI sunt generate automat...' present
critical_code_review_comments: CODE NOTE: AI model in backend is gpt-4o-mini (line 734: .with_model('openai', 'gpt-4o-mini')) but spec says GPT-4o. This may be intentional cost optimization. Frontend shows 'GPT-4o' in the subtitle. Minor discrepancy between spec and actual model used.

CACHE NOTE: Cache lookup at line 616 uses find_one without checking generated_at in query — loads ANY cached entry then checks timestamp in Python. Works correctly but a MongoDB query with timestamp filter would be slightly more efficient.
GOOD: Cache upsert with replace_one+upsert=True ensures only one cache entry per user. Correct implementation.
test_credentials: Demo PRO: GET /api/auth/demo-login?secret=finromania-demo-2026 → session_token. localStorage keys: finromania_token, finromania_user
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. AI cache entry stored in portfolio_ai_cache collection for demo_63007e5f122b at 2026-03-27T21:58:22 UTC. Cache expires after 60 minutes.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Faza 3 AI Advisor fully verified. GET /api/portfolio-bvb/ai-analysis returns portfolio_summary (overall_signal=HOLD, risk_level=MEDIU) + positions (BRD+H2O, both PĂSTREAZĂ with RIDICAT confidence). MongoDB cache (portfolio_ai_cache collection) working: from_cache=True on second call. Frontend: ai-advisor-section renders SUMAR GLOBAL with correct badge colors (HOLD=blue MENȚINE, MEDIU=amber), per-position cards with PĂSTREAZĂ blue badges, confidence ●●● dots, cache indicator 'Din cache · HH:MM UTC'. Model is gpt-4o-mini (not gpt-4o despite spec).
rca_of_issue: N/A — all tests passed, no bugs found
